creator: martin@lispworks.com
text: The section in /usr/libexec/bsdinstall/zfsboot following the comment "Touch up permissions on the tmp directories" uses $BSDINSTALL_CHROOTDIR, but this variable is undefined.  It should probably be $BSDINSTALL_CHROOT, if this chmods are needed at all (shouldn't they be handled by the distextract phase anyway?).
